hero.title: Quick Notepad
hero.description: Write plain-text notes, save them locally in your browser, and reopen them after refresh.

flow.title: Write → Save → Reopen
steps: Auto-save the note in this browser
Reopen the saved note after refresh

differences.title: Keep one quick note available in this browser
differences.description: Quick Notepad combines focused plain-text writing, visible local save status, and simple file portability.

items.title: Write
items.description: Capture or paste plain text in a focused editor.

items.title: Save locally
items.description: Auto-save the current note in browser localStorage.

items.title: Reopen
items.description: Restore the saved note when the page loads again.

feel.title: A note that is ready when you return
feel.description: The workspace keeps writing, save status, statistics, and file actions visible together.

items.title: Start quickly
items.description: Use the starter note or begin with an empty note.

items.title: See save status
items.description: Know when changes are unsaved, saved locally, or empty.

items.title: Move plain text
items.description: Import or download TXT files without a server.

audiences.title: Who uses Quick Notepad
audiences.description: Useful for anyone who needs one lightweight local note.

items.title: Students
items.description: Capture quick study notes and reminders.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Keep meeting points and temporary working text nearby.

items.title: Everyday users
items.description: Save a simple note locally without creating an account.

resourceSection.title: Local note essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed to write, retain, and move one plain-text note.

items.title: Auto-save status
items.description: Track local save state while writing.

items.title: Realtime statistics
items.description: See characters, words, and lines update.

items.title: TXT portability
items.description: Import and download plain-text files in the browser.

groupedSection.title: Write and reopen a local note
groupedSection.description: Keep plain-text capture and browser-local persistence connected.

items.name: Plain text
items.description: Type or paste content without formatting complexity.

items.name: Local auto-save
items.description: Save changes automatically in this browser.

items.name: Reopen after refresh
items.description: Restore locally saved text on the next page load.

items.name: Import and export
items.description: Move note content through TXT files.

technicalSection.title: Designed for local browser persistence
technicalSection.description: Quick Notepad follows the shared Ansiversa client-side utility architecture.
items: Browser localStorage note persistence with no cloud sync.

finalCta.title: Write a quick local note
finalCta.description: Open Quick Notepad to write, save locally, and reopen later.
